name: Perplexity - Ask Anything
oneLiner: Perplexity — ИИ-поисковик с ответами и источниками: чат + веб-поиск с цитатами
keyFeatures: Answer engine: conversational answers with cited sources
Pro searches with model selection (GPT, Claude, own models)
Voice assistant mode, follow-up questions, threads
Pro subscription unlocks more pro searches and models
